title.en: Ye Tian was not worried about the crisis of fal...

content.en:
Ye Tian was not worried about the crisis of falling, it didn't matter if he sent a replica body to help, even if the replica body really fell, there would not be much loss.

But the premise for him to help is that Qingfeng Daozu is willing to take out the treasure that makes him happy, otherwise he won't help.

At this time, Xuanqing Dao Ancestor said: "This is a treasure that Qingfeng Dao Ancestor can take out, you can choose any one." "

Airplanes!!!!

The phantom of one treasure after another appeared, allowing Ye Tian to observe and choose.

There are not many treasures, but each one is extremely precious, and it is a treasure that Qingfeng Dao Ancestor has collected for endless years.

After all, when he reached the realm of the half-step sevenfold original ancestor, his strength was strong, and he had become a half-step sevenfold ancestor for a long time, so he naturally had the opportunity to obtain a large number of treasures.

And Ye Tian's cultivation time was too short, and there were not many treasures he encountered.

For example, among these treasures is the Daokong True Tree, and it is also a complete Daokong True Tree, which is also in this reward.

However, Ye Tian didn't need the Daokong True Tree, this thing might be very precious to the peak powerhouse of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor who had not comprehended the prototype of the Yuan Dao, but it was useless to him.

Moreover, he can also replicate the Daokong True Tree, so there is no shortage of this treasure.

Soon, Ye Tian made a good choice.

"Golden Branch!"

The reason why Ye Tian chose this treasure was that this treasure was one of the most valuable treasures for the sixfold peak ancestor, suitable for the original ancestor who had comprehended the prototype of the Yuan Dao, and could greatly improve the perception of the prototype of the Yuan Dao, and was called one of the top treasures suitable for improving the prototype of the Yuan Dao.

Of course.

If you don't comprehend the rudiments of the Yuan Dao, the Golden Branch Void Fruit is of no use, and if you comprehend the Yuan Dao, the Golden Branch Void Fruit is of no use.

However, if you comprehend the rudiments of the Yuan Dao, as long as your comprehension is not bad, you will definitely be able to comprehend the true Yuan Dao in the future, it is just a matter of time.

Therefore, for those Dao Ancestors who have comprehended the rudiments of the Yuan Dao, the Golden Branch Void Fruit only saves a long time of penance, but they may not be able to completely comprehend the Yuan Dao.

The effect of the Golden Fruit is related to one's own understanding and potential.

But Ye Tian wanted to save time, his cultivation speed was too fast, and it didn't take long to become a Sixfold Ancestor, so he didn't want to waste a long time on comprehending the Yuan Dao.

Therefore, the Golden Branch Void Fruit was more valuable to him than other treasures.

"Golden Branches Void Fruit, I'll tell Qingfeng Dao Ancestor!"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestral Dao.

"The payment should be paid first!"

Ye Tian asked.

Xuanqing Daozu nodded: "After entering the Truncated Black Mountain, Qingfeng Daozu will immediately give you a reward, so don't worry." Moreover, this is also a default rule, and it has been carried out many times, and Qingfeng Daozu does not dare to violate it. "

"Then no problem!"

Ye Tiandao.

......

Time flies, and hundreds of thousands of Primordial Era have passed.

Finally, on this day, Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the other seven half-step sevenfold ancestors had taken care of all the affairs and were about to leave, so they notified Ye Tian and the other Dao Ancestors.

The boundary of the Youhe District.

These half-step sevenfold Dao ancestors agreed to meet here.

Soon, a half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor gathered here, and Ye Tian also came here, he was the only Dao Ancestor of the late stage of the sixfold primordial ancestor.

However, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor present did not dare to underestimate him.

When he was in the Yuanshen Drum Ancient Nest before, Ye Tian showed his strength, which was definitely no less than the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, and his strength was not weak.

"Fellow Dao Ancestors, the seven of us are going to leave here and go to the area that cuts off the other side of the Black Mountain, we just need you to help us break through the area where the Primordial Ancient Stone Clan is located!" Qingfeng Dao Ancestor said.

At this time, another Dao Ancestor said: "Qingfeng Dao Ancestor, you want us to help you leave, we come here, naturally we agree, but the reward must not be less, otherwise we will leave immediately." "

"Naturally!"

Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and other seven Dao Ancestors responded one after another.

Soon, many Dao Ancestors set off.

This time, Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the other seven Dao Ancestors asked for a total of more than sixty half-step sevenfold original ancestors.

You must know that there are only hundreds of half-step sevenfold ancestors in this area, some half-step sevenfold ancestors are in some special treasure lands and cannot be contacted, and some have been in retreat.

Therefore, Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and they were able to invite more than sixty half-step sevenfold ancestors, which was already quite good.

Wow!

Many Dao Ancestors shuttled through the Silent Black Sea area, constantly flying towards the Cut Black Mountain.

Along the way, everyone also encountered some primordial ancients, but they were all killed in seconds without any threat.

"Let's be faster, speed up with all our might, the time is limited, even if we are half-step sevenfold ancestors, we can't stay in the silent Black Sea region all the time, otherwise we will attract a large number of primordial ancients comparable to half-step sevenfold ancestors, it won't be good!" Qingfeng Dao Ancestor urged.

Many Dao Ancestors nodded, they all knew the dangers of the Silent Black Sea.

The half-step sevenfold ancestor who fell in the Silent Black Sea is not nothing, they all died by themselves!

Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the seven Dao Ancestors were going to leave here, and if they delayed a little, they would encounter a large number of primordial antiquities.

So, they have to hurry.

After all, even if you break through the Truncated Montenegro, there are other dangers, and time is precious.

There is no certain certainty and life-saving ability, and no half-step sevenfold ancestor dares to break through like this.

Not long after, many Dao Ancestors came to Cut off Black Mountain.

Cutting off Black Mountain across time and space, spreading endless areas, and cutting off many areas of Black Mountain is extremely dangerous, even after the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor enters, he will definitely die.

So, they can only cross from a few places, and this time they chose one of the safest sections, but the safety is only relative.

......

"This is it, let's come from here, at the beginning we will encounter a little bit of primordial antiquities, and when we reach the middle area, we will meet the primordial ancient stone clan, break through the primordial ancient stone clan, and the most dangerous place will be crossed, and there is no need to trouble you later!" Qingfeng Dao Ancestor said.

Just after entering the Interception Black Mountain, Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and the others immediately took out the reward.

Otherwise, there would be no pay, and many Dao Ancestors would turn around and leave as soon as possible.

After all, no one wants to work in vain.

Moreover, coming here this time is also risky, in case of an accident, it is normal to die some half-step sevenfold ancestors.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian put away the Golden Branch Void Fruit given by Qingfeng Dao Ancestor and smiled.

The reward was given, and many Dao Ancestors escorted Qingfeng Dao Ancestors and they quickly went deep to cut off Black Mountain.

Soon, hundreds of primordial antiquities appeared.

"Go straight through, don't get entangled!"

Qingfeng Dao ancestral road.

Rumble!!!

Many Dao Ancestors ignored these primordial artifacts and directly chose to move forward, shuttling here at an extremely fast speed.

Of course, sometimes you can't avoid it, so let's all fight and kill the original antiquities.

Finally, after some time, they arrived at the territory of the Primordial Ancient Stone Clan.
